raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2024, three fraudulent purchases were made with my GAP credit card, which is provided by Barclays. I was able to cancel/reverse 2 of the 3 transactions but not the 3rd. I have called Barclays three time to try to resolve the issue, but it is still showing that I owe a balance. I have reported the charges as fraud multiple times and Barclays is refusing to acknowledge this.
